headline: Fifth Third’s Newline Recognized by American Banker for Powering Next-Generation Payments Infrastructure
summary: CINCINNATI, June 05, 2026--Fifth Third Bank (NASDAQ: FITB) today announced that its Newline™ platform has been named an Innovation of the Year 2026 honoree by American Banker, recognizing its role in powering large-scale payments and embedded finance capabilities for fintechs and enterprise clients.
